title: SVNIT Notification 2026 - Apply Offline for Research Associate I Posts
description: Sardar Vallabhbhai National Institute of Technology Surat (SVNIT Surat) has declared the official notification for 2026. To fill up the vacancies for Research Associate I Jobs. Those candidates who have qualified for a Ph.D. can use this chance and apply for the SVNIT Notification 2026 . Here we mentioned more details about the age limit, selection process, salary structure, education details, applciation fee, and how to apply for these posts.
